tools.name: get_scheduling_pages
tools.description: Get all scheduling pages for the authenticated user

tools.name: get_page_info
tools.description: Get information about a specific scheduling page

tools.name: get_available_slots
tools.description: Get available booking slots for a scheduling page

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check if the Meet.bot API client is healthy and the Bearer token is valid

tools.name: list_webhooks
tools.description: List the authenticated user's outbound booking webhooks (fired on booking_received, booking_rescheduled and booking_cancelled)

tools.name: set_webhook
tools.description: Create or update an outbound booking webhook. Omit id to create (webhook_url required); pass id to update. Meet.bot POSTs a JWT-signed (HS256) JSON payload to the URL on each booking event.

tools.name: delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete one of the authenticated user's webhooks by id

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "health_check" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check if the Meet.bot API client is healthy and the Bearer token is valid
